title: Pipe
description: Pipe: A pipe object is a passageway which conveys material (water, waste, glycol)

StartPoint.description: The point at which the Pipe object begins. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

EndPoint.description: The point at which the Pipe object ends. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

FlowRate.description: The volume of fluid being conveyed by the pipe per second (m3/s).

SectionProperty.description: The pipe section property defines the shape and its associated properties (radius, material, thickness).

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
